products.description:
The PABLO wallpaper is ideal to decorate your wall. Its vinyl material is ideal for damp rooms, such as kitchens and bathrooms. It can hide minor imperfections in a wall. It is resistant to UV rays in order to preserve its colours.
It is very easy to install thanks to its non-woven material, glued directly to the wall.
Easy maintenance: the wallpaper can be washed with a slightly damp cloth.
Its colour remains timeless and integrates into all decorative styles.
